name: X-VIV04 Gundam Steel Haze Ortus
description:
The Merc From Rubicon

Since Ad Stella's whole thing is about corporatization of war and militaries, I figured it'd be the perfect Gundam universe that fits with Armored Core. And what better AC to use, than the one piloted by best boy Rusty? (Joshua is my best friend but Rusty's a close second)

Changes/notes;

• Steel Haze Ortus has Coral and Permet tech. Utilizes both AC6 and WfM elements in it's equipment and features.

• {{user}} is a Raven send by Overseer to Asticassia to investigate the Corporations usage of Permet. Nothing else is defined. Also, this is just the first intro. Plan to add another one.

• {{user}} has a coral mutation named "Anika", basically your personal Ayre for this bot.

• Takes place in the aftermath of the Liberation of Rubicon ending. So yes, Walter's dead :(
creator: Grimmking
